security.title: Data Protection and Secure Operation
security.subtitle: Nova Insights is built on Microsoft Azure's enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure, ensuring maximum security, stability, and performance for all our customers.
security.feature1: Nova Insights runs on Microsoft Azure
security.feature2: Data is handled within EU-compatible frameworks
security.feature4: Everything is processed securely and temporarily
security.feature5: Documentation can be exported and deleted
security.azureDescription: With Azure's global network and advanced security protocols, you can be sure that your data is protected in accordance with international standards.
security.azureTagline: We deliver a tool that strengthens documentation and reduces risk – not the other way around.
security.trustBanner: Enterprise-grade security • Trusted by leading enterprises

securityGdpr.title: GDPR & Data Protection
securityGdpr.subtitle: We comply with the EU General Data Protection Regulation and protect your personal information
securityGdpr.compliantDesc1: follows the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Danish data protection legislation in all aspects of our business.
securityGdpr.compliantDesc2: We have implemented comprehensive technical and organizational measures to ensure that your personal data is processed securely and in accordance with applicable law.
securityGdpr.obligationsSubtitle: As data controller, we have implemented the following measures to protect your data:
securityGdpr.encryptedDesc: All communication is protected with 256-bit SSL/TLS encryption
securityGdpr.euHostingDesc: Data is only stored on servers within the EU with GDPR compliance
securityGdpr.minimalDataDesc: We only store data as long as necessary - automatic deletion
securityGdpr.accessControlDesc: Strict role-based access control and 2-factor authentication
securityGdpr.dpaDesc: All third parties have signed GDPR-compliant agreements
securityGdpr.transparencyDesc: Clear communication about how we use your data
securityGdpr.rightsSubtitle: As a data subject, you have extensive rights. We guarantee quick processing of all requests (within 30 days as required by GDPR).
securityGdpr.rightAccessDesc: You have the right to receive a copy of all personal data we have about you, as well as information about what data we process and why.
securityGdpr.rightRectificationDesc: You can have incorrect or incomplete information about yourself corrected. We will update your information as quickly as possible.
securityGdpr.rightErasure: Right to erasure - "Right to be forgotten" (Article 17)
securityGdpr.rightErasureDesc: You can have your personal data deleted, unless we have a legal reason to keep it (e.g., accounting requirements).
securityGdpr.rightPortabilityDesc: You can receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format (e.g., JSON or CSV).
securityGdpr.contactDesc: Do you have questions about GDPR or want to exercise your rights? Contact our DPO, who will respond to your inquiry within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions for using Nordic AI Group's platform and services
terms.intro2: platform and services, you accept the following terms and conditions.
terms.intro3: Please read these terms carefully, as they define your rights and obligations when using our services.
terms.section1Intro: Nordic AI Group delivers intelligent analysis tools specifically designed for the construction industry. Our main product, Schedule Agent, automates comparison and analysis of project plans.
terms.sla1: The service is provided "as is" with ongoing development and improvements
terms.sla2: We aim for 99.9% uptime, but cannot guarantee uninterrupted operation
terms.sla3: Planned maintenance is announced at least 48 hours in advance
terms.sla4: We strive for high accuracy, but analyses may have error margins
terms.importantDesc: The platform is a helper tool and does not replace professional project management or legal advice. The end user is responsible for verifying and validating analyses.
terms.resp1: Ensuring that uploaded files and data do not contain confidential or personally sensitive information that must not be processed
terms.resp2: Keeping login information secure and not sharing access with unauthorized persons
terms.resp3: Complying with applicable law when using the platform
terms.resp4: Informing Nordic AI Group if security breaches are suspected
terms.prohibited1: Reverse engineering or attempts to copy our technology
terms.prohibited2: Misuse of the platform for illegal or harmful purposes
terms.prohibited3: Upload of malware, viruses or harmful code
terms.prohibited4: Automated scraping or unauthorized access to the system
terms.prohibited5: Redistribution or resale of the service without permission
terms.section3Intro: All rights to source code, design, algorithms, software, documentation and other material belong to Nordic AI Group ApS and are protected by Danish and international copyright law.
terms.get1: Right to use the platform (not ownership)
terms.licenseNote: Important: The license is personal and non-exclusive. It cannot be transferred to third parties without written approval from Nordic AI Group ApS.
terms.payment1: Prices: All prices are excl. VAT (25%) and invoiced monthly
terms.payment2: Payment deadline: Net 14 days from invoice date
terms.payment3: Price adjustments: We reserve the right to adjust prices with 30 days notice
terms.payment4: Late payment: Interest is added according to interest law
terms.cancel1: Notice period: 30 days to the end of a month
terms.cancel2: No refund: Already paid amounts are not refunded upon cancellation
terms.cancel3: Data access: Upon cancellation, 30 days access is given to download own data
terms.cancel4: Automatic renewal: Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled
terms.section5Intro: Nordic AI Group ApS' liability is limited as follows:
terms.notLiable1: Indirect loss, operating loss or consequential loss
terms.notLiable3: Loss due to third party actions
terms.notLiable4: Loss due to Force Majeure (natural disasters, war, cyber attacks, etc.)
terms.notLiable5: Loss due to user's incorrect use
terms.notLiable6: Loss due to outdated software or hardware at the customer
terms.maxLiability: Nordic AI Group ApS' total liability is in all cases limited to the amount the customer has paid in the last 3 months prior to the damage.
terms.section6Title: 6. Choice of law and dispute resolution
terms.lawChoiceDesc: These terms of service and any disputes arising in connection therewith are subject to Danish law.
terms.jurisdictionDesc: Any disputes that cannot be resolved amicably shall be settled by Copenhagen City Court as the first instance.
terms.section7Intro: Nordic AI Group ApS reserves the right to change these terms of service as needed.
terms.change1: You will be informed at least 30 days before the change takes effect
terms.change2: Notification is sent via email to your registered contact
terms.change3: In case of disagreement, you have the right to terminate the agreement without notice
terms.change4: Continued use after the change date constitutes acceptance of the new terms
terms.questionsDesc: If you have questions or are unsure about anything in these terms of service, please contact us.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We take the protection of your personal data seriously and follow all GDPR rules
privacy.intro2: collects, uses and protects your information in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Danish data protection legislation.
privacy.intro3: We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal data with the utmost care and respect.
privacy.section1Intro: We only collect information that is strictly necessary to deliver our service. This ensures minimal data collection and maximum protection of your privacy.
privacy.collectContactDesc: Name, email, phone number and company information when contacting through contact forms or chat
privacy.collectProjectDesc: Any uploaded files (schedules, project files) in connection with use of our platform
privacy.collectTechnicalDesc: IP address, browser type, device type and visit information (for security and analysis purposes)
privacy.collectUsageDesc: Information about how you use our platform to improve user experience
privacy.section2Intro: Your information is used solely for legitimate business purposes and never for sale or transfer to third parties without your consent:
privacy.useServiceDesc: To deliver and improve our analysis tools for the construction industry
privacy.useCommunicationDesc: To communicate with customers about support, new features, updates and service-related messages
privacy.useSecurityDesc: To maintain platform security, quality assurance and GDPR compliance
privacy.useAnalysisDesc: To analyze user behavior to improve our products and user experience
privacy.storageAutoDesc: Uploaded files and input data are automatically deleted after processing. We do not store your project files longer than necessary.
privacy.storagePersonalDesc: Personal information such as name, email and phone number is only stored as long as necessary for the purpose for which it was collected, or as required by law.
privacy.storageCustomerDesc: For active customer relationships, data is stored for up to 5 years after the contract ends for accounting and legal reasons.
privacy.storageInactiveDesc: Contact information from non-converted inquiries is deleted after 24 months.
privacy.section4Intro: As a data subject, you have the following rights under GDPR:
privacy.rightAccessDesc: You can request a copy of all personal information we have about you
privacy.rightRectificationDesc: You can have incorrect or incomplete information corrected
privacy.rightErasureDesc: You can have your personal information deleted ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.rightPortabilityDesc: You can get your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.rightObjectDesc: You can object to certain forms of data processing
privacy.rightRestrictionDesc: You can request restriction of the processing of your data
privacy.contactRights: To exercise your rights, contact us at:
privacy.section5Intro: We only use data processors within the EU or in countries with adequate protection under GDPR. All data processors are contractually obligated to comply with GDPR requirements.
privacy.thirdPartyCloud: Cloud hosting providers – for secure storage of data (e.g. AWS, Azure)
privacy.thirdPartyAnalytics: Analytics services – to understand platform usage (anonymized data)
privacy.thirdPartyComm: Communication platforms – for email and chat communication
privacy.thirdPartyPayment: Payment providers – for secure handling of payments
privacy.noSell: We never sell or rent your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.section6Intro: We have implemented comprehensive technical and organizational security measures to protect your data:
privacy.securitySslDesc: All data transfer is encrypted with 256-bit SSL
privacy.securityAccessDesc: Strict access control and authentication for all users
privacy.securityHostingDesc: Data is stored on secure, GDPR-compliant servers in the EU
privacy.questionsTitle: Do you have questions about your privacy?
privacy.questionsDesc: We are here to help you. Contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) if you have questions about how we process your personal information.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Building intelligent solutions for the construction industry
about.companyDesc2: , a Danish company specialized in intelligent automation solutions.
about.focusDesc1: We automate complex, manual knowledge work with a focus on
about.missionText: To give project teams a tool that creates clarity, reduces risk and saves time – every day.
about.founderDesc: The company was founded by Kasper Skovgaard Rasmussen, serial entrepreneur with many years of experience in sales, marketing and business development. Kasper has a strong ability to spot opportunities, think unconventionally and create solutions that make a real difference in everyday life.
